data_description.disable_emitter: Remove the linked infrared emitter from this universal remote.

error.command_name_exists: A command with this name already exists.

error.library_commands_required: Select at least one infrared library command.
error.learn_receiver_busy: The selected infrared receiver is already learning another command.

error.invalid_learn_candidate: Selected learned command candidate is invalid.

error.learn_test_send_failed: The learned command test send failed. You can retry capture, save anyway, or discard the learned command.
error.invalid_learn_overwrite_action: Selected learned-command overwrite action is invalid.
error.learn_pronto_conversion_failed: The captured signal could not be converted to a valid Pronto HEX command. Retry capture or discard the learned command.
error.invalid_learn_failure_action: Selected learned-command recovery action is invalid.
